name: Chen Qin
page_title: Chen Qin 陳勤 [Wu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
Prior to the date set for an attack on Mo, Ling Tong and Controller Chen Qin attended a banquet together. Chen Qin was of a fiery temper; and because he was in charge of keeping order at the banquet, he abused his powers and bullied everyone there, punishing people not according to the rules. Ling Tong, upset at his insolence, confronted him. Chen Qin angrily affronted Ling Tong and insulted even his [late] father Ling Cao. Ling Tong, though in tears, did not respond to the insult. Everyone then left the gathering. Emboldened in his inebriation, Chen Qin insulted Ling Tong again on the road. Ling Tong, not being able to bear it any more, pulled out his sabre and struck Chen Qin. Chen Qin died in a few days from wounds.

From Ling Tong’s SGZ

full_text:
Chen Qin 陳勤
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Qin (陳勤). Abused his power, insulted Ling Tong and Ling Cao at banquet, later killed. Chen Qin was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Chen Qin lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.

Prior to the date set for an attack on Mo, Ling Tong and Controller Chen Qin attended a banquet together. Chen Qin was of a fiery temper; and because he was in charge of keeping order at the banquet, he abused his powers and bullied everyone there, punishing people not according to the rules. Ling Tong, upset at his insolence, confronted him. Chen Qin angrily affronted Ling Tong and insulted even his [late] father Ling Cao. Ling Tong, though in tears, did not respond to the insult. Everyone then left the gathering. Emboldened in his inebriation, Chen Qin insulted Ling Tong again on the road. Ling Tong, not being able to bear it any more, pulled out his sabre and struck Chen Qin. Chen Qin died in a few days from wounds.
